---
title: "The Rev. Charles Henry Waller"
---

## The Rev. Charles Henry Waller

**Dates:** (1840-1910)

### Description

principal of St. John’s Hall, Highbury

### Biography

He was author of <i>The Names on the Gates of Pearl</i>. He married (22 July 1865) Anna Maria Stubbs. He was tutor and then (1884) principal of St. John's Hall, Highbury, theological college.  His mother was the niece of Mary Martha Sherwood [ODNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
